---
name: "\U0001F41B Bug Report"
about: Report a bug in DataCat
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

# Prerequisites

Please answer the following questions for yourself before submitting an issue. **YOU MAY DELETE THE PREREQUISITES SECTION.**

- [ ] I am running the latest version
- [ ] I checked the documentation and found no answer
- [ ] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed

# Part of DataCat
- [ ] UI (Editor)
- [ ] Flow
- [ ] Launcher
- [ ] API
- [ ] Server

## Description
Describe the problem as clear as possible.

## Expected behavior
What do you think should normally happen?

**Actual behavior**
What actually happens?

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See bug

## Screenshots/Logs
Please add screenshots, logs or error codes

## Environment
- DataCat Version + Build: [e.g. 1.0.1-beta.1 Build 13]
- Operating system: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Linux Debian]
- OS Version [e.g. Windows 11 25H2 26200.8037]
- Java Vendor/Version: [use ``java -version`` on your system]

**Additional information**
What might be helpful for us to know?
